stimulus: Public libraries in many cities have adjusted their hours to better serve the community, says librarian Marta Rivera. After conducting surveys, several branches in Boston shifted to evening hours when patrons indicated that ______blank preferred to visit after work.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. The convention being tested is pronoun–antecedent agreement. The plural pronoun “they” agrees in number with the plural antecedent “patrons.”

Choice A is incorrect because the singular pronoun “he” doesn’t agree with the plural antecedent. Choice B is incorrect because the singular pronoun “one” doesn’t agree with the plural antecedent. Choice D is incorrect because the singular pronoun “it” doesn’t agree with the plural antecedent.
